---
title: "ED_Self-Esteem_Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-04"
---

```{r}
#Code Chunk 1

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(psych)  
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)


data <- read_csv("/Users/matthewgibbs/Documents/Work/Coding/DissDataA+G2.csv")

# Clean data:
summary_data_clean <- data %>%
  filter(!(is.na(SC2) & is.na(SC3) & is.na(SC4) & is.na(SC5))) %>%
  select(ResponseId, SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5) %>%
  mutate(across(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.)))) %>%
  filter(if_all(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ !is.na(.) & !is.nan(.) & !is.infinite(.))) %>%
  filter(if_all(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ .x != 0))

n_before <- nrow(summary_data_clean)

summary_data_clean <- summary_data_clean %>%
  filter(if_all(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ .x != 0))

n_after <- nrow(summary_data_clean)

cat("Rows removed (had 0 in SC2–SC5):", n_before - n_after, "\n")
cat("Rows remaining:", n_after, "\n")

cat("Cleaned data summary:\n")
print(summary(summary_data_clean))
cat("Number of valid responses after dropping zeros:", nrow(summary_data_clean), "\n")

# Descriptive statistics
descriptives <- summary_data_clean %>% 
  summarise(
    n          = n(),                    

    EDEQ_mean  = mean(SC2),
    EDEQ_sd    = sd(SC2),
    EDEQ_ci_l  = EDEQ_mean - qt(.975, n - 1) * EDEQ_sd / sqrt(n),
    EDEQ_ci_u  = EDEQ_mean + qt(.975, n - 1) * EDEQ_sd / sqrt(n),

    SCS_mean   = mean(SC3),
    SCS_sd     = sd(SC3),
    SCS_ci_l   = SCS_mean  - qt(.975, n - 1) * SCS_sd  / sqrt(n),
    SCS_ci_u   = SCS_mean  + qt(.975, n - 1) * SCS_sd  / sqrt(n),

    RSES_mean  = mean(SC4),
    RSES_sd    = sd(SC4),
    RSES_ci_l  = RSES_mean - qt(.975, n - 1) * RSES_sd / sqrt(n),
    RSES_ci_u  = RSES_mean + qt(.975, n - 1) * RSES_sd / sqrt(n),

    DERS_mean  = mean(SC5),
    DERS_sd    = sd(SC5),
    DERS_ci_l  = DERS_mean - qt(.975, n - 1) * DERS_sd / sqrt(n),
    DERS_ci_u  = DERS_mean + qt(.975, n - 1) * DERS_sd / sqrt(n)
  ) %>% 
  select(-n)                            


print("Descriptive Statistics:")
print(descriptives)

preds    <- summary_data_clean %>% 
  select(
    SCS  = SC3,   # Self‐Compassion Scale
    RSES = SC4,   # Rosenberg Self‐Esteem Scale
    DERS = SC5    # Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale
  )
corr_res <- psych::corr.test(preds, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

print(preds)

#Histogram and Shapiro-Wilk test for normality
ggplot(summary_data_clean, aes(x = SC2)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "grey", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of EDE-Q (SC2)", x = "EDE-Q Score", y = "Frequency")

shapiro_result <- shapiro.test(summary_data_clean$SC2)
print("Shapiro-Wilk Test for Normality of EDE-Q:")
print(shapiro_result)

# Regression Analysis:
model_EDE <- lm(SC2 ~ SC3 + SC4 + SC5, data = summary_data_clean)


model_EDE_summary <- tidy(model_EDE, conf.int = TRUE)

rename_predictors <- function(df, model_name) {
  df %>%
    mutate(Model = model_name,
           term = dplyr::recode(term,
                                `(Intercept)` = "Intercept",
                                "SC2" = "EDE-Q",
                                "SC3" = "SCS",
                                "SC4" = "RSES",
                                "SC5" = "DERS"))
}


model_EDE_summary <- rename_predictors(model_EDE_summary, "EDE-Q Model")


kable(model_EDE_summary, digits = 3,
      caption = "Regression Model: EDE-Q Predicted by SCS, RSES, and DERS") %>%
  kable_styling()

model_step1 <- lm(SC2 ~ SC4 + SC5, data = summary_data_clean)

model_step2 <- lm(SC2 ~ SC4 + SC5 + SC3, data = summary_data_clean)

anova_comparison <- anova(model_step1, model_step2)

hier_summary <- bind_rows(
  tidy(model_step1, conf.int = TRUE)  %>% mutate(Model = "Step 1: RSES + DERS"),
  tidy(model_step2, conf.int = TRUE)  %>% mutate(Model = "Step 2: + SCS")
) %>%
  rename(Predictor = term, Estimate = estimate, StdError = std.error,
         Statistic = statistic, P.value = p.value, CI.lower = conf.low,
         CI.upper = conf.high)

kable(
  hier_summary,
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Table 2. Hierarchical Regression Coefficients"
) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

r2_table <- tibble(
  Step       = c("Step 1", "Step 2"),
  Predictors = c("RSES + DERS", "RSES + DERS + SCS"),
  R2         = c(summary(model_step1)$r.squared,
                 summary(model_step2)$r.squared)
) %>%
  mutate(Delta_R2 = R2 - lag(R2))

kable(
  r2_table,
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Table 3. R² and ΔR² by Step"
) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

cat("\nANOVA: Step 1 vs. Step 2\n")
print(anova_comparison)


model <- model_EDE

par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
plot(summary_data_clean$SC3, summary_data_clean$SC2, main = "EDE-Q vs SCS",
     xlab = "SCS", ylab = "EDE-Q", col = "darkblue")
abline(lm(SC2 ~ SC3, data = summary_data_clean), col = "red")

plot(summary_data_clean$SC4, summary_data_clean$SC2, main = "EDE-Q vs RSES",
     xlab = "RSES", ylab = "EDE-Q", col = "darkgreen")
abline(lm(SC2 ~ SC4, data = summary_data_clean), col = "red")

plot(summary_data_clean$SC5, summary_data_clean$SC2, main = "EDE-Q vs DERS",
     xlab = "DERS", ylab = "EDE-Q", col = "darkorange")
abline(lm(SC2 ~ SC5, data = summary_data_clean), col = "red")

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
plot(model, which = 1)  # Residuals vs Fitted

plot(model, which = 2)  # Q-Q plot
hist(residuals(model), main = "Histogram of Residuals", col = "lightgrey", xlab = "Residuals")

library(car)
vif_values <- vif(model)
print("Variance Inflation Factor (VIF) for each predictor:")
print(vif_values)

plot(model, which = 4)  # Cook's Distance plot

cooks_d <- cooks.distance(model)
influential_points <- which(cooks_d > 4/length(cooks_d))  # Rule of thumb
cat("Potential influential points (Cook's D > 4/n):\n")
print(influential_points)

#Durbin-Watson Test
dw_result <- durbinWatsonTest(model)
print("Durbin-Watson Test for Autocorrelation:")
print(dw_result)

# Pearsons
full_corr <- psych::corr.test(
  summary_data_clean %>% select(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5),
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)
print(full_corr$r)    # correlations
print(full_corr$p)    # p-values

```


```{r}
#Code chunk 2 EFA

data <- read_csv("/Users/matthewgibbs/Documents/Work/Coding/DissDataA+G2.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(if_all(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ .x != 0))

edeq_items <- grep("^Q[0-9]+$", names(data), value = TRUE)
edeq_df <- data %>%
  select(all_of(edeq_items)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.))))

edeq_df <- edeq_df[rowSums(is.na(edeq_df)) <= 10, ]

edeq_df <- edeq_df %>%
  select(where(~ var(.x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0))

cor_mat  <- cor(edeq_df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
n_cases  <- nrow(edeq_df)

omega_results <- omega(cor_mat, nfactors = 4, flip = TRUE)
print(omega_results$omegaHierarchical)

fa.parallel(cor_mat,
            n.obs  = n_cases,
            fa     = "fa",
            n.iter = 100,
            fm     = "ml")

efa1 <- fa(
  r        = cor_mat,
  nfactors = 1,
  fm       = "ml",
  n.obs    = n_cases
)
print(efa1)

```

```{r}
# Code Chunk 3 - Demographics & Scale Descriptives

raw <- read_csv("/Users/matthewgibbs/Documents/Work/Coding/DissDataA+G2.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

data_clean <- raw %>%
  mutate(
    Gender = factor(Gender, levels = c("1", "2")),
    Age    = as.numeric(Age),
    SC2    = as.numeric(SC2),
    SC3    = as.numeric(SC3),
    SC4    = as.numeric(SC4),
    SC5    = as.numeric(SC5)
  )


analytic <- data_clean %>%
  filter(if_all(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ .x != 0))

analytic <- analytic %>% filter(!is.na(Gender))


N_analytic <- nrow(analytic)  # should equal 138

mean_ci <- function(x) {
  x <- na.omit(x)
  n  <- length(x)
  m  <- mean(x)
  sd <- sd(x)
  err <- qt(.975, n - 1) * sd / sqrt(n)
  tibble(M = m, SD = sd, CI_L = m - err, CI_U = m + err)
}

vars <- c(
  Age  = "Age",
  EDEQ = "SC2",
  SCS  = "SC3",
  RSES = "SC4",
  DERS = "SC5"
)

var_labels <- c(
  Age  = "Age",
  SC2  = "EDE-Q total",
  SC3  = "Self-Compassion Scale",
  SC4  = "Rosenberg Self-Esteem",
  SC5  = "DERS total"
)

overall_desc <- map_df(vars,
  ~ mean_ci(analytic[[.x]]),
  .id = "Variable"
) %>%
  mutate(N = N_analytic, .before = M) %>%
  mutate(Variable = var_labels[Variable])

by_gender_desc <- analytic %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Age, SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5),
               names_to  = "var",
               values_to = "val") %>%
  group_by(Gender, var) %>%
  summarise(
    tibble::as_tibble(mean_ci(val)),
    N = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(Variable = var) %>%
  mutate(Variable = case_when(
    Variable == "Age" ~ "Age",
    Variable == "SC2" ~ "EDE-Q total",
    Variable == "SC3" ~ "Self-Compassion Scale",
    Variable == "SC4" ~ "Rosenberg Self-Esteem",
    Variable == "SC5" ~ "DERS total",
    TRUE              ~ Variable
  )) %>%
  select(Gender, N, Variable, M, SD, CI_L, CI_U)



age_cor <- map_df(vars[-1], 
  ~ {
    test <- cor.test(analytic$Age, analytic[[.x]], conf.level = 0.95)
    tibble(
      Variable = names(vars)[vars == .x],
      r        = unname(test$estimate),
      p.value  = test$p.value,
      CI_L     = test$conf.int[1],
      CI_U     = test$conf.int[2]
    )
  }
)


gender_tt <- map_df(vars[-1],
  ~ {
    test <- t.test(analytic[[.x]] ~ analytic$Gender,
                   var.equal = FALSE, conf.level = 0.95)
    tibble(
      Variable = names(vars)[vars == .x],
      t        = test$statistic,
      p.value  = test$p.value,
      CI_L     = test$conf.int[1],
      CI_U     = test$conf.int[2]
    )
  }
)

prop_fem <- prop.test(
  x          = sum(analytic$Gender == "2"),
  n          = N_analytic,
  conf.level = 0.95
)
prop_female_tbl <- tibble(
  Proportion_Female = unname(prop_fem$estimate),
  CI_L              = prop_fem$conf.int[1],
  CI_U              = prop_fem$conf.int[2]
)

overall_desc
by_gender_desc
age_cor
gender_tt
prop_female_tbl

```

```{r}
# Code chunk 4

raw <- read_csv("/Users/matthewgibbs/Documents/Work/Coding/DissDataA+G2.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

data_clean <- raw %>%
  mutate(
    Gender = factor(Gender, levels = c("1", "2")),
    Age    = as.numeric(Age),
    SC2    = as.numeric(SC2),
    SC3    = as.numeric(SC3),
    SC4    = as.numeric(SC4),
    SC5    = as.numeric(SC5)
  )

analytic <- data_clean %>%
  filter(if_all(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ .x != 0))

N_analytic <- nrow(analytic)  # should equal 138

mean_ci <- function(x) {
  x <- na.omit(x)
  n  <- length(x)
  m  <- mean(x)
  sd <- sd(x)
  err <- qt(.975, n - 1) * sd / sqrt(n)
  tibble(M = m, SD = sd, CI_L = m - err, CI_U = m + err)
}

var_labels <- c(
  Age  = "Age",
  SC2  = "EDE-Q total",
  SC3  = "Self-Compassion Scale",
  SC4  = "Rosenberg Self-Esteem",
  SC5  = "DERS total"
)
vars <- names(var_labels)   # c("Age","SC2","SC3","SC4","SC5")

overall_desc <- map_df(vars,
  ~ mean_ci(analytic[[.x]]),
  .id = "Variable"
) %>%
  mutate(N = N_analytic, .before = M) %>%
  # map the codes to labels
  mutate(Variable = var_labels[Variable])

by_gender_desc <- analytic %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(vars),
               names_to  = "Variable",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  group_by(Gender, Variable) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_ci(Value),
    N = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Variable = var_labels[Variable]) %>%
  select(Gender, N, Variable, M, SD, CI_L, CI_U)

age_cor <- map_df(vars[-1],  # drop Age itself
  ~ {
    test <- cor.test(analytic$Age, analytic[[.x]], conf.level = 0.95)
    tibble(
      Variable = var_labels[.x],
      r        = unname(test$estimate),
      p.value  = test$p.value,
      CI_L     = test$conf.int[1],
      CI_U     = test$conf.int[2]
    )
  }
)



gender_tt <- map_df(vars[-1],
  ~ {
    test <- t.test(analytic[[.x]] ~ analytic$Gender,
                   var.equal  = FALSE,
                   conf.level = 0.95)
    tibble(
      Variable = var_labels[.x],
      t        = test$statistic,
      p.value  = test$p.value,
      CI_L     = test$conf.int[1],
      CI_U     = test$conf.int[2]
    )
  }
)

prop_fem <- prop.test(
  x          = sum(analytic$Gender == "2"),
  n          = N_analytic,
  conf.level = 0.95
)
prop_female_tbl <- tibble(
  Proportion_Female = unname(prop_fem$estimate),
  CI_L              = prop_fem$conf.int[1],
  CI_U              = prop_fem$conf.int[2]
)

overall_desc
by_gender_desc
age_cor
gender_tt
prop_female_tbl

```

```{r}
#Code Chunk 5



data_raw <- read_csv("/Users/matthewgibbs/Documents/Work/Coding/DissDataA+G2.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

df <- data_raw %>% filter(if_all(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ .x != 0))

edeq_items <- names(df)[21:48]
df <- df %>% select(all_of(edeq_items))
df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x))))

e <- edeq_items
res_items    <- e[1:5]
eat_items    <- e[c(7, 9, 19, 20, 21)]
shape_items  <- e[c(6, 8, 10, 11, 23, 26, 27, 28)]
weight_items <- e[c(8, 12, 22, 24, 25)]

pdf(NULL)
alpha_res    <- psych::alpha(df[res_items],    check.keys = TRUE)
alpha_eat    <- psych::alpha(df[eat_items],    check.keys = TRUE)
alpha_shape  <- psych::alpha(df[shape_items],  check.keys = TRUE)
alpha_weight <- psych::alpha(df[weight_items], check.keys = TRUE)
alpha_total  <- psych::alpha(df,               check.keys = TRUE)
dev.off()

cat("Restraint α =",    round(alpha_res$total$raw_alpha,  2), "\n")
cat("EatingConcern α =",round(alpha_eat$total$raw_alpha,  2), "\n")
cat("ShapeConcern α =", round(alpha_shape$total$raw_alpha, 2), "\n")
cat("WeightConcern α =",round(alpha_weight$total$raw_alpha, 2), "\n")
cat("Total 28-item α =", round(alpha_total$total$raw_alpha, 2), "\n\n")

df_scores <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Restraint     = rowMeans(across(all_of(res_items)),    na.rm = TRUE),
    EatingConcern = rowMeans(across(all_of(eat_items)),    na.rm = TRUE),
    ShapeConcern  = rowMeans(across(all_of(shape_items)),  na.rm = TRUE),
    WeightConcern = rowMeans(across(all_of(weight_items)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(GlobalMean = rowMeans(across(c(Restraint, EatingConcern, ShapeConcern, WeightConcern)), na.rm = TRUE))

tests <- lapply(
  list(Restraint=df_scores$Restraint, EatingConcern=df_scores$EatingConcern,
       ShapeConcern=df_scores$ShapeConcern, WeightConcern=df_scores$WeightConcern),
  function(x) cor.test(x, df_scores$GlobalMean, use = "complete.obs")
)
names(tests) <- c("Restraint","EatingConcern","ShapeConcern","WeightConcern")
for (nm in names(tests)) {
  t <- tests[[nm]]
  cat(nm, ": r =", round(t$estimate,3), ", p =", format.pval(t$p.value, digits=3), "\n")
}


df_all   <- data_raw %>% filter(if_all(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ .x != 0))
```
